description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

🆕 New (Published: June 25, 2026)

AI Summary (Please check the original article for accurate information)

Hanno City will reopen 7 tourism public restrooms that were closed due to emergency fiscal measures.

【Reopening Schedule】
• Early July: Takedera Tourism Public Restroom (704 Minami), Takedera Entrance Tourism Public Restroom (750-1 Minami), Adera Suwa Shrine Tourism Public Restroom (1843 Nagasawa)
• Preparing to reopen: Nakai Tourism Public Restroom (219 Nakai), Hanno Tourist Information Center Tourism Public Restroom (1051-8 Hanno), Ozawa Tourism Public Restroom (1128-1 Shimona'guri), Kawamata Tourism Public Restroom (558-1 Shimona'guri)

Reopening dates will be updated as needed.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kankyokeizaibu/kanko/13714.html
